evals.prompt: Enrich the lead jane@acme.com — I want their LinkedIn, title, and the company's funding.
evals.expected_output: A merged enrichment JSON with person (full_name, title, linkedin_url) and company (name, domain, funding) sourced primarily from Sixtyfour, derived domain acme.com.
assertions: The skill derives domain acme.com from the email
Step 1 calls https://api.sixtyfour.ai/enrich-lead as a routed POST
Step 2 calls https://api.sixtyfour.ai/enrich-company as a routed POST
The output includes person.linkedin_url and company.funding fields
meta.total_cost reflects the executed steps

evals.prompt: Deep-enrich jane@acme.com, her name is Jane Doe and the company is Acme.
evals.expected_output: Enrichment run where firstName=Jane, lastName=Doe, and company=Acme are passed into the Sixtyfour enrich-lead body to improve match rate.
assertions: The enrich-lead body lead_info includes first_name Jane, last_name Doe, and company Acme
The enrich-lead body lead_info includes email jane@acme.com and domain acme.com
All steps use rail routed

evals.prompt: Enrich jane@acme.com but Sixtyfour came back with no LinkedIn URL — what happens?
evals.expected_output: The Apollo /api/v1/people/match fallback (Step 3) runs only because the LinkedIn URL was missing, adding $0.01.
assertions: Apollo people/match runs only when Sixtyfour returns no LinkedIn URL
Step 3 calls https://api.apollo.io/api/v1/people/match as a routed POST with email and reveal_personal_emails true
The person.source for LinkedIn is marked apollo with medium confidence

evals.prompt: Run deep enrichment for jane@acme.com; Sixtyfour didn't return funding data.
evals.expected_output: The Apollo organizations/enrich fallback (Step 4) runs because funding data was missing, querying by domain.
assertions: Apollo organizations/enrich runs only when Sixtyfour returns no funding data
Step 4 calls https://api.apollo.io/api/v1/organizations/enrich with a GET and domain query param
company.funding.source reflects apollo for the filled fields

evals.prompt: What does a full gtm-enrichment-deep run cost and what is the cap?
evals.expected_output: Per-step caps $0.10 + $0.10 + $0.01 + $0.01; a full run is about $0.22 and the manifest maxAmount is $0.25.
assertions: The manifest maxAmount is 0.25
Step maxAmount values are 0.10, 0.10, 0.01, 0.01 in order
The sum of step caps is 0.22

evals.prompt: Which payment rail does gtm-enrichment-deep use?
evals.expected_output: Every step is routed MPP via the SELAT Router; there is no direct rail in this skill.
assertions: All four steps have rail routed
The skill notes SELAT_ROUTER_URL must be set
No step uses the direct rail
